mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_teacher_student_pair (id, teacher_account, teacher_name, teacher_level, student_account, student_name, student_level, org_id, org_name, pair_status, start_date, end_date, sign_file_url, create_account) VALUES (#{id}, #{teacherAccount}, #{teacherName}, #{teacherLevel}, #{studentAccount}, #{studentName}, #{studentLevel}, #{orgId}, #{orgName}, #{pairStatus}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{signFileUrl}, #{createAccount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_account AS teacherAccount, teacher_name AS teacherName, teacher_level AS teacherLevel, student_account AS studentAccount, student_name AS studentName, student_level AS studentLevel, org_id AS orgId, org_name AS orgName, pair_status AS pairStatus, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, sign_file_url AS signFileUrl, create_account AS createAccount, create_time AS createTime, update_account AS updateAccount, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_teacher_student_pair WHERE id = #{pairId}

SELECT id, teacher_account AS teacherAccount, teacher_name AS teacherName, teacher_level AS teacherLevel, student_account AS studentAccount, student_name AS studentName, student_level AS studentLevel, org_id AS orgId, org_name AS orgName, pair_status AS pairStatus, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, sign_file_url AS signFileUrl, create_account AS createAccount, create_time AS createTime, update_account AS updateAccount, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_teacher_student_pair
org_id = #{orgId}
CONCAT(teacher_name, student_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT account, name, level, work_year AS workYear, is_manager AS isManager, job_type AS jobType FROM staff_info WHERE level >= 13 AND work_year >= 2 AND account NOT IN ( SELECT teacher_account FROM tb_teacher_student_pair WHERE pair_status = 'TRAINING' ) AND org_id = #{orgId}

SELECT account, name, level, job_type AS jobType FROM staff_info WHERE level IN (14, 15) AND account NOT IN ( SELECT student_account FROM tb_teacher_student_pair WHERE pair_status = 'TRAINING' ) AND org_id = #{orgId}
